zh.lifeSummary: Amicia la Fusche於大約1172年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯沃迪。她於大約1193年與John le Strange II在英國英格蘭史洛普爾皮福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1235年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾利勒沙拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Amicia la Fusche于大约1172年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾斯沃迪。她于大约1193年与John le Strange II在英国英格兰史洛普爾皮福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1235年在英国英格兰史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾利勒沙拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Fusche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Gerhardt, Guenther, Liselotte, Otto.
German: variant (from an inflected form) of   Busch  .

variants.name: Busch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Bernd, Hans, Wolfgang, Klaus, Lorenz, Dieter, Erna, Ernst, Helmut, Meinrad.

German (also Büsch): topographic name for someone who lived by a thicket or wood, from Middle Low German, Middle High German busch ‘bush, copse’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word or Büsch.

en.lifeSummary: Amicia la Fusche was born about 1172, in Cheswardine, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. She married John le Strange II about 1193, in Pitchford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1235, in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Lilleshall, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Amicia la Fusche est née environ 1172, à Cheswardine, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé John le Strange II environ 1193, à Pitchford, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1235, à Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Lilleshall, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Amicia la Fusche wurde um 1172 in Cheswardine, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1193 in Pitchford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom John le Strange II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1235 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lilleshall, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John le Strange II circa 1193, nel Pitchford, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1235, nel Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Lilleshall, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Amicia la Fuscheは約1172年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアチェスワーディンで生まれた。約1193年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアピトチフォードでJohn le Strange IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1235年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアノクイン イン オスウエストリーで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアリレシャルにて埋葬された。

ko.Knockin Castle, Knockin in Oswestry, Shr: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스w스트리
ko.lifeSummary: Amicia la Fusche(은)는 대략 1172년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 체스워딘에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1193년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 피트ch퍼드에서 John le Strange II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스w스트리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 릴레샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Amicia la Fusche nasceu aproximadamente 1172, em Cheswardine, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com John le Strange II aproximadamente 1193, em Pitchford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1235, em Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Lilleshall, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Knockin Castle, Knockin in Oswestry, Shr: ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Amicia la Fusche родилась около 1172 г. в местности чесвардаин, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Strange II около 1193 г. в местности пичфорд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1235 г. в местности ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности лиллешолл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió en 1235, en Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Lilleshall, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
